name: BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Horizontal)
notes: This rule detects horizontal authentication failure brute force attack by looking at large number of authentication failure events in a small time frame with multiple distinct user accounts being targeted from the same origin.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Horizontal) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 minutes
thresholds: when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Horizontal) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
AND when at least 10 events are seen with the same Source IP and different Username in 1 minutes
